rag_rules: When validator reports type errors, trace unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers in the same annex and fix the root cause or remove the clause.
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, avoiding subcomponent ports unless represented through variables or outputs.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid type errors.
Ensure that component type contracts contain only valid feature references or named constants.
Validate that all identifiers used in guarantees are either visible or declared locally in the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference valid, typed expressions; avoid using undefined or untyped identifiers.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-level subcomponent ports directly.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to resolve type errors; instead, fix the root cause or remove invalid clauses.
Avoid placing assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes when they should reside in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
